playbook.intent: Run a controlled pricing or packaging test from hypothesis through experiment design, segment selection, rollout, measurement, and a packaging decision the business can act on.
playbook.scope: Run a controlled pricing or packaging test from hypothesis through experiment design, segment selection, rollout, measurement, and a packaging decision the business can act on.

success-criteria.criterion: Honest read of the result (confirm / refute / inconclusive)
Packaging decision doc the business can act on

stage.name: Hypothesis
stage.intent: Frame the pricing or packaging question the experiment must answer.

tasks.task: Write a one-sentence pricing hypothesis with expected lift
Identify the segment whose behaviour the experiment will move
Define the primary metric and a tripwire metric

outputs.output: Hypothesis doc with primary + tripwire metrics

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the hypothesis has a numeric prediction and a single primary metric.

stage.name: Design
stage.intent: Convert the hypothesis into a runnable experiment.

tasks.task: Choose experiment type (A/B, holdout, sequential, willingness-to-pay survey)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when design is reviewable by a non-PM stakeholder and the stop rule is unambiguous.

stage.name: Segment selection
stage.intent: Pick the audience cohort that will receive the variant.

tasks.task: Validate the cohort can be reached by billing tooling
Confirm cohort exclusions for compliance / contracts

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the cohort is reachable in production with the engineering team's confirmation.

stage.name: Rollout
stage.intent: Ship the variant with reversible controls.

tasks.task: Coordinate billing + entitlement changes with engineering
Wire instrumentation against the primary metric
Run a smoke test on a tiny exposure first

stage.decision-gate: Advance when smoke test confirms instrumentation fires correctly and rollback was rehearsed.

stage.name: Measurement

tasks.task: Wait the pre-registered duration before peeking
Run the analysis exactly as pre-registered
Surface practical significance, not only statistical

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the verdict is one of {confirm, refute, inconclusive} backed by the pre-registered analysis.

stage.name: Decision
stage.intent: Convert the result into a packaging decision.

tasks.task: Sequence the rollout schedule for affected accounts
Brief sales + support before broad rollout

stage.decision-gate: Required: a written packaging decision the business can ship.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content pricing-experiment-hypothesis-to-result --format md, agent: faion get-content pricing-experiment-hypothesis-to-result --format context, json: faion get-content pricing-experiment-hypothesis-to-result --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
